title: Run live TUI launch QA through tmux
prompt: Run the real TUI launch QA phase through tmux and verify that startup, help, status, autocomplete, prompt entry, cancellation, permission chrome, and exit all leave visible evidence, while default help/status/autocomplete surfaces stay free of internal QA terminology.

args: import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; import { defaultUserSurfaceLeakFailures } from './scripts/tui-surface-leaks.mjs'; const manifest=JSON.parse(readFileSync('.omo/evidence/kimi-agent-bench/system-suite/tui-launch-tmux/manifest.json','utf8')); const summary=JSON.parse(readFileSync('.omo/evidence/kimi-agent-bench/system-suite/tui-launch-tmux/tui/summary.json','utf8')); if (manifest.status !== 'tui-launch-pass') throw new Error(`manifest status ${manifest.status}`); if (summary.status !== 'PASS') throw new Error(`tui summary status ${summary.status}`); const required=['startup','help','status','clear','autocomplete','prompt-entry','escape-cancel','permission-mode','exit']; for (const name of required) { const capture=summary.captures?.find((entry)=>entry.scenario===name); if (capture?.status !== 'PASS') throw new Error(`missing passing capture ${name}`); } for (const name of ['help','status','autocomplete']) { const capture=summary.captures?.find((entry)=>entry.scenario===name); const text=readFileSync(capture.path,'utf8').replaceAll(/\u001B\[[0-?]*[ -/]*[@-~]/g,'').replaceAll(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); const leaks=defaultUserSurfaceLeakFailures(name,text); if (leaks.length > 0) throw new Error(leaks.join('; ')); } const synthetic=defaultUserSurfaceLeakFailures('status','/status diagnostics /preflight /bench internal QA ultrawork'); if (synthetic.length < 5) throw new Error('shared default surface leak detector missed synthetic leaks');
